--- graph_table_join.sql
SELECT a.id, g.v
FROM Accounts AS a
JOIN GRAPH_TABLE (FinGraph LET x = 1 RETURN x AS v) AS g
ON a.id = g.v

--- AST
&ast.QueryStatement{
  Query: &ast.Select{
    Results: []ast.SelectItem{
      &ast.ExprSelectItem{
        Expr: &ast.Path{
          Idents: []*ast.Ident{
            &ast.Ident{
              NamePos: 7,
              NameEnd: 8,
              Name:    "a",
            },
            &ast.Ident{
              NamePos: 9,
              NameEnd: 11,
              Name:    "id",
            },
          },
        },
      },
      &ast.ExprSelectItem{
        Expr: &ast.Path{
          Idents: []*ast.Ident{
            &ast.Ident{
              NamePos: 13,
              NameEnd: 14,
              Name:    "g",
            },
            &ast.Ident{
              NamePos: 15,
              NameEnd: 16,
              Name:    "v",
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
    From: &ast.From{
      From:   17,
      Source: &ast.Join{
        Left: &ast.TableName{
          Table: &ast.Ident{
            NamePos: 22,
            NameEnd: 30,
            Name:    "Accounts",
          },
          As: &ast.AsAlias{
            As:    31,
            Alias: &ast.Ident{
              NamePos: 34,
              NameEnd: 35,
              Name:    "a",
            },
          },
        },
        Op:    "INNER JOIN",
        Right: &ast.GraphTableExpr{
          GraphTable: 41,
          RParen:     86,
          GraphName:  &ast.Path{
            Idents: []*ast.Ident{
              &ast.Ident{
                NamePos: 54,
                NameEnd: 62,
                Name:    "FinGraph",
              },
            },
          },
          Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
            Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
              &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
                Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
                  &ast.GQLLet{
                    Let:   63,
                    Items: []*ast.GQLLetItem{
                      &ast.GQLLetItem{
                        Ident: &ast.Ident{
                          NamePos: 67,
                          NameEnd: 68,
                          Name:    "x",
                        },
                        Expr: &ast.IntLiteral{
                          ValuePos: 71,
                          ValueEnd: 72,
                          Base:     10,
                          Value:    "1",
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                  &ast.GQLReturn{
                    Return: 73,
                    Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
                      &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                        Star: -1,
                        Expr: &ast.Ident{
                          NamePos: 80,
                          NameEnd: 81,
                          Name:    "x",
                        },
                        Alias: &ast.AsAlias{
                          As:    82,
                          Alias: &ast.Ident{
                            NamePos: 85,
                            NameEnd: 86,
                            Name:    "v",
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          As: &ast.AsAlias{
            As:    88,
            Alias: &ast.Ident{
              NamePos: 91,
              NameEnd: 92,
              Name:    "g",
            },
          },
        },
        Cond: &ast.On{
          On:   93,
          Expr: &ast.BinaryExpr{
            Op:   "=",
            Left: &ast.Path{
              Idents: []*ast.Ident{
                &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 96,
                  NameEnd: 97,
                  Name:    "a",
                },
                &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 98,
                  NameEnd: 100,
                  Name:    "id",
                },
              },
            },
            Right: &ast.Path{
              Idents: []*ast.Ident{
                &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 103,
                  NameEnd: 104,
                  Name:    "g",
                },
                &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 105,
                  NameEnd: 106,
                  Name:    "v",
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
SELECT a.id, g.v FROM Accounts AS a INNER JOIN GRAPH_TABLE(FinGraph LET x = 1 RETURN x AS v) AS g ON a.id = g.v
